cases.prompt: Review this iPad card drag. It jumps under my finger, snaps back after a fast flick, and cannot be interrupted while settling.
Design the gesture and motion behavior for a SwiftUI bottom sheet with three stops, scroll conflict, cancellation, and Reduce Motion support.
Fix the delayed pressed state and double-tap conflict in this UIKit control, then exercise cancellation and recovery.
People do not discover that this panel can be swiped away. Diagnose the interaction and propose a testable correction.
Choose a type scale and line height for this settings screen.
Review these brand colors and suggest a more premium palette.
Make a decorative loading illustration loop with more visual flair.
Diagnose why this database query is slow and optimize the index.
